SYS // BIOS

INIT WASD MOTIVE

OPTICS MOUSE

ENGAGE L-CLICK / E INTERACT

STASH TAB

OVERRIDE V SANDBOX

DEPLOYMENT: EXTRACT ORGANIC MATTER. EVADE PATROLS.

E INTERACT

CORE INTEGRITY

100%

MATTER VAULT

0

STASH INVENTORY

0

DEBUG CONSOLE

SELECT DROP ZONE

ZONE-01: THE MAZE

High Threat. Heavy Drone Patrols.

Massive Biomass Cache.

STASH INVENTORY

BIOMASS ORE

Used to construct upgrades and munitions.

0

SCRAP METAL

Recovered from hostile drones.

0
EXTRACTION SECURE
ORGANIC MATTER COLLECTED
0
SECTOR YIELD RATING
